text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On a day off, I go to the racecourse to<n>watch
some races for research...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! That's it! You're almost<n>there!
Don't be scared!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Stay at it! The finish<n>line is right in
front of you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Huh... Oh, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Haha... Apologies for my unseemly<n>behavior.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I just can't contain my excitement<n>once they
round the fourth corner.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's a moment when the stakes are<n>so high that
a runner's entire<n>demeanor changes. Do you
know<n>what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I just can't resist that thrill!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's... Ahem. Sorry, I'm doing it<n>again. That's
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She says that, but she looks like she<n>hasn't
even scratched the surface of<n>this topic.
choice_data_list: Well, I have work to do, so...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure?! I know it's an<n>important time for
you and your<n>trainee, so you must be busy...
choice_data_list: It's okay. I have the day off.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well, if you say so!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I know! Talking is nice and all, but a<n>chat over
lunch would be even better,<n>don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Actually, there's a spot nearby that<n>I've always
wanted to try out...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It's such an honor to be able<n>to chat with
you like this, just the two<n>of us!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So, about the race earlier...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I know just what you mean!<n>It's so
encouraging to see them<n>chasing after their
dreams with all<n>they have!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But it's the voices of all the fans<n>cheering them
on that keeps driving<n>them forward...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it like that, races really<n>do bring
people together, don't they?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: On that note, last year's races were<n>also...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The Derby! The Derby is the best! Of<n>course, the
G1 races are all amazing<n>and deserve every bit
of respect they<n>receive.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But I have a special attachment to the<n>Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Actually, I watch it every year without<n>fail!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! How did it get so late<n>already?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the students, we don't exactly<n>have a
curfew, so...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Would you mind staying out a little<n>longer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so we move to another shop,<n>where we
continue to talk<n>passionately about racing.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I... can't believe it's already<n>morning...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ummm... I'm sorry for keeping you<n>out like this.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: But, well...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In truth, from the time we first met, I<n>could tell you
were also passionate<n>about Umamusume and
racing...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's great to be able to talk in depth<n>about this
with someone! I had a<n>wonderful time, hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
If it's okay with you, let's do this<n>again
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, but we probably shouldn't stay<n>up all night
next time!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I can feel the tiredness creeping up<n>on me...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We make our way back to the<n>academy, stifling
our yawns as we go.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It feels like my friendship with Tazuna<n>has grown
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right, of course! It's an important<n>time in your
trainee's career right<n>now—you must be busy.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um... Well, I'll be off, then. I'll see you<n>around at
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, Tazuna and I go our separate<n>ways...
